privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View Sync Tasks
privilege.description: Allows viewing sync task history and status. Users can see sync task information but cannot create or modify tasks.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Manage Sync Tasks
privilege.description: Allows creating and managing sync tasks. Users can create, update, and delete sync tasks. This should be granted to system administrators and data managers.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View Sync Task Types
privilege.description: Allows viewing sync task type configurations. Users can see task type definitions and settings.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Manage Sync Task Types
privilege.description: Allows managing sync task type configurations. Users can create and modify sync task types. This should be granted to system administrators only.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View FHIR Resources
privilege.description: Allows viewing FHIR sync resources. Users can see FHIR resources but cannot modify them.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Manage FHIR Resources
privilege.description: Allows managing FHIR sync resources. Users can create, update, and delete FHIR resources. This should be granted to data managers and system administrators.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View FHIR Profiles
privilege.description: Allows viewing FHIR profile configurations. Users can see FHIR profile settings and mappings.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Manage FHIR Profiles
privilege.description: Allows managing FHIR profile configurations. Users can create and modify FHIR profiles. This should be granted to system administrators only.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View FHIR Cases
privilege.description: Allows viewing FHIR case-based profiles. Users can see FHIR case resources but cannot modify them. This should be granted to clinicians and data managers.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Manage FHIR Cases
privilege.description: Allows managing FHIR case-based profiles. Users can create, update, and delete FHIR case resources. This should be granted to data managers and system administrators.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View Lab Results
privilege.description: Allows viewing lab results from external systems. Users can view laboratory results but cannot modify them. This should be granted to clinicians, nurses, and lab staff.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Manage Lab Results
privilege.description: Allows managing lab results from external systems. Users can import, update, and delete lab results. This should be granted to lab staff and data managers.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Manage Lab Orders
privilege.description: Allows sending lab orders to external systems like CPHL. Users can create and send viral load orders. This should be granted to clinicians and lab staff.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View Referrals
privilege.description: Allows viewing referral information. Users can see referral details but cannot modify them. This should be granted to clinicians and nursing staff.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Manage Referrals
privilege.description: Allows managing referral information. Users can create, update, and delete referrals. This should be granted to clinicians and referral coordinators.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View Referral Orders
privilege.description: Allows viewing referral orders for CPHL. Users can see referral orders but cannot modify them. This should be granted to clinicians and nursing staff.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View Reports
privilege.description: Allows viewing sync reports and statistics. Users can access reports about sync operations and statistics. This should be granted to managers and supervisors.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Send Reports
privilege.description: Allows sending reports to external systems. Users can trigger report generation and transmission. This should be granted to data managers and system administrators.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: View Sync Statistics
privilege.description: Allows viewing sync statistics and metrics. Users can access detailed statistics about sync operations. This should be granted to managers and technical staff.

privilege.name: UgandaemrSync: Manage Sync Configuration
privilege.description: Allows managing sync module configuration. Users can modify global properties and system settings. This privilege should be granted to system administrators only.

globalProperty.description: This is the recency password that the system will connect to
This is the analytics username that the system will connect to
This is the analytics password that the system will connect to
This is the facility DHIS2 password that the system will connect to
This is the facility DHIS2 password that the system will connect to
The last successful submission date for analytics send data task scheduler
The last successful submission date for recency send data task scheduler
Turns on and off the submission of recency data once daily or multiple time in specified interval
ARTAccess last successful submission date
SMS Appointment Reminder last successful submission date

Enable development mode for SSL/TLS connections. When set to true, allows self-signed certificates using a custom trust store. MUST be set to false in production environments to ensure proper certificate validation and prevent man-in-the-middle attacks.

Path to custom trust store file (JKS format) for self-signed certificates in development environments. Leave empty in production. Used only when ugandaemrsync.ssl.developmentMode is true. Example: /etc/ssl/certs/custom-truststore.jks
Password for the custom trust store. Used only when ugandaemrsync.ssl.developmentMode is true and ugandaemrsync.ssl.trustStore.path is specified.
This is the username for server that the system would like to connect to
This is the password for server that the system would like to connect to
When Enabled to true CBS FHIR Data will be synced to the central fhir server
This is the national Health facility Registry Unique Identifier
This is the national Health facility Registry url to get districts
This is the national Health facility Registry url to get facilities
Base url used for making API Calls internally in java
Alternative Base url used for making API Calls internally in java
url system form openmrs ID
url system form passport
url system form national ID
url system form health Identification Number
The endpoint to get Drug Balance
The endpoint to Update Emr Posted Status
The endpoint to update eafya on the usage report
Gets the token for the eafya session
Gets stock item that has been received
Gets stock item that has been received
Send Prescription to eAFYA for patient
Gets Product Catalogue from eAFYA
The Last Sync Date for Stock
The Site ID for a facility in the eafya
The source store ID for a facility in the eafya
The clinic id for the ART clinic in eAFYA
The Operation towards recieving of Items, options available are (Submitted,Completed)
The Viral load required fields codes
The minimum Length of a CPHL Barcode.
The Concept ID for allowable referral orders to be synced to CPHL
The number of days to look back for viral load orders to sync. Prevents querying all historical orders. Default is 90 days.
The allowable test order to be referred and their data requirements.

Directory path (relative to OpenMRS application data directory or module classpath) from which to import FHIR profile configurations. This can be an absolute path, a path relative to the OpenMRS application data directory, or a classpath-relative path. Default is 'configuration/hie' which looks for profiles in {OPENMRS_DATA_DIR}/configuration/hie/ and classpath:configuration/hie/
